HOPformer

ECCV 2026

 

Something exciting is coming.

Full details, code, and paper will be released at ECCV 2026. Stay tuned!

 

We’d tell you more, but then the transformer would have nothing to attend to at the conference.

 

Watch this space — good things are worth waiting for.
